steps.t: Dwarf-workers can be found north of Bósi's encampment, all along the winding road that runs up to the Hollin Gate. Bósi has asked you to deliver lunch…
The dwarf Wárr is at the Hollin Gate, supervising the workers there. Now that you have delivered the lunches to the dwarf-workers along the road to th…
Bósi is overseeing some of the waggons near the banks of the dried-up Sirannon, south of the road that winds up to the Hollin Gate. Wárr has asked you…
